scripts.test:node: tsx --tsconfig tsconfig.node.json --test durable-streams/tests/*.test.ts durable-effects/tests/*.test.ts core/tests/frontmatter.test.ts core/tests/heal.test.ts core/tests/scanner.test.ts core/tests/eval-transform.test.ts core/tests/eval-interpolate.test.ts core/tests/ema-api.test.ts core/tests/output-normalize.test.ts core/tests/output-terminal.test.ts
scripts.test:bun: bun test durable-streams/tests/ durable-effects/tests/ core/tests/frontmatter.test.ts core/tests/heal.test.ts core/tests/scanner.test.ts core/tests/eval-transform.test.ts core/tests/eval-interpolate.test.ts core/tests/ema-api.test.ts core/tests/output-normalize.test.ts core/tests/output-terminal.test.ts
scripts.lint: oxlint -c .oxlintrc.json core/src/ cli/src/ durable-streams/ durable-effects/ runtime/ && oxfmt --check core/src/ cli/src/ durable-streams/ durable-effects/ runtime/ vendor/ test-support/
scripts.fmt: oxfmt --write core/src/ cli/src/ durable-streams/ durable-effects/ runtime/ vendor/ test-support/ core/tests/ durable-streams/tests/ durable-effects/tests/ packages/code-review-agent/
